name: Inside · Cutaway / texture

do: macro-level detail of the interior or texture
one short hero phrase (≤ 6 words) in brand display font
dont: no people in the cutaway shot
no exaggerated 'exploded view' if the product is a simple object

body: Amazon listing inside-the-product image for {{PRODUCT_NAME}}, 2000×2000 square. A clean cross-section / cutaway of the product revealing its interior detail. Background: {{BRAND_PRIMARY_COLOR_NAME}}. Macro-level detail showing the most distinctive interior feature. One short hero phrase in {{BRAND_FONT_PRIMARY}}, set in uppercase, color {{BRAND_ACCENT_COLOR}}. Phrase: short, energetic, in the {{BRAND_VOICE_ADJECTIVES}} voice. Lighting emphasizes texture without becoming gimmicky.

angles.name: Cutaway diagonal (default)
angles.description: Clean diagonal cutaway revealing interior, hero phrase top-left.

angles.name: Texture macro (no cutaway)
angles.description: Close-up of the surface or texture of the product, not a literal cutaway.
angles.prompt_modifier: Skip the cutaway. Instead, frame is a tight texture macro — surface detail at ~3× life size, fine grain visible. Hero phrase bottom-right in {{BRAND_ACCENT_COLOR}}.
